Frequently Asked Questions
1. Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 03 July 2026.
2. Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Interview Date?
The Interview will be conducted in 20-27 July 2026 .
3. Where can I find the Selection Procedure for the Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Examination?
The detailed Selection Procedure for the Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete Selection Procedure details.
4. Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 15 July 2026..
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates are not required to pay any application fee.
7. How can I apply for Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Exam?

tables: Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Interview Latter

Bihar State University Service Commission (BSUSC), Patna has released Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this BSUSC Assistant Professor Vacancy can apply online from 03 July 2026 to 15 July 2026 . Read the notification for BSUSC Assistant Professor eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information.

Bihar State University Service Commission (BSUSC) Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Contact Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : BSUSC/CAP-01 to 06/2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012

Important Dates Application Begin : 03/07/2026 Last Date for Apply : 15/07/2026 Interview Dates : 20-27 July 2026 Merit List Available: 29/07/2026 Preference of Colleges : 30/07/2026 Final Allotment : 01/08/2026 Last Date for Joining : 07/08/2026
Application Fees General / OBC / EWS : 0 /- SC / ST : 0 /- No Application Fee Details Mention in Notification.

Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/08/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years. Maximum Age : 43 Years. Age Relaxation as per Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Rules.
Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 3687 Post
Bihar BSUSC Assistant Professor Recruitment Eligibility Details
Master’s Degree in Hindi / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
Master’s Degree in Economics / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
Master’s Degree in History / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
Master’s Degree in Political Science / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
Master’s Degree in English / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
Master’s Degree in Sociology / Equivalent Subject with 55% Marks (Gen/EWS) or 50% Marks (Reserved Category) + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.
